title: dichanthelium olivaceum
intro: Dichanthelium olivaceum, also known as olive hair grass or wild hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dichanthelium olivaceum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, relieve headaches, and even reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Dichanthelium olivaceum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
